title: I'd like to delete files from board folder
excerpt: I’d like to delete files from a board folder, but the ‘delete file’ option is greyed out. Anyone know how I can turn the function on please?

posts.author: audiuosues (Sue Richards)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to delete files from a board folder, but the ‘delete file’ option is greyed out. Anyone know how I can turn the function on please?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @audiuosues , are you owner of those files? and the owner of the board? If yes, you should be able to delete them.

posts.author: audiuosues (Sue Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m not the owner, but the owner has the same view as me - the delta files option is greyed out?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @audiuosues , can you please provide a screenshot where the option to delete the file is greyed out?

Also, if you could confirm that if you upload a new file and associate it with an item, are you able to delete this newly uploaded file or not.

posts.author: audiuosues (Sue Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2023-12-14 at 14.29.15.png2880×1800 590 KB

Thanks Zaki. Screenshot attached.

If I add an attachment in an update I can delete from the update record but not from the files folder.

S

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @audiuosues

@BiancaT , I have a feeling this has something to do with permissions that are unknown to me. Is there anyway the administrator could potentially disable deletion of files?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for flagging @ZakiImtiaz

Hey Sue! If you hover over the greyed out “delete file” option, can you let me know what appears? From my understanding, if files are uploaded via the updates section, it isn’t possible to delete them from the files gallery view, they need to be deleted from the update itself - does this make sense? That said, if you’re uploading files directly to the files gallery view or the files column, you should be able to delete the files without an issue.

posts.author: jwang (JJ)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT, I understand that files that are uploaded via the updates section cannot be deleted from the files gallery view. However, I am having trouble deleting them from the updates view also. The delete icon is greyed out. Permission wise, I am the owner of the board. I have included a picture showing it too.
